data.title: Dow Jones falls, AI stocks struggle, Nasdaq lags due to Broadcom's plunge on earnings, while Tesla rival surges.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline while AI stocks struggled, notably Broadcom stock plummeted due to disappointing earnings. The stock market also saw the Nasdaq underperforming, with Tesla's competitor seeing a significant rise. This update indicates a dynamic market environment with fluctuations in stock values.

data.title: In 2025, 66% of short-term Bitcoin traders were profitable for 229 days despite a 30% price drop. Will this continue in 2026?
data.description: This year, short-term traders were able to make profits for 229 days, even with Bitcoin's price experiencing a 30% correction. The question now is whether this trend of profitability will continue into the year 2026.

data.title: Silver's value surpasses oil for the first time in 45 years, with silver at $60 per ounce and oil below $60 per barrel. Silver has surged 110% and oil has dropped 22% this year, marking a significant shift in the commodity market hierarchy.
data.description: Silver has surpassed a milestone not seen since 1980, with its price now exceeding $60 per ounce, while oil remains below $60 per barrel. This means that currently, one ounce of silver can purchase more than a single barrel of oil, a situation last observed in January 1980, if disregarding the anomaly in April 2020 when WTI futures briefly went negative. This shift is not only significant by itself but also signifies a major change in the global commodity markets. Year-to-date, silver, as represented by the iShares Silver Trust (NYSE: SLV), has surged by 110%, while oil has plummeted by 22%. Consequently, the silver-to-oil ratio has reached new record highs, indicating a remarkable trend. This evolution is highlighted as "Silver Completes 45-Year Revenge Against Oil", illustrating how silver has outperformed oil significantly in recent times. This development signifies a notable turnaround as for years, oil was the predominant commodity dictating economic growth trends.

data.title: Global GMP cytokine market to grow at 8.4% CAGR from 2025-2031, driven by immunotherapies. Major players include Bio-Techne, PeproTech, CellGenix.
data.description: In Dublin, a report on the GMP Cytokine Market predicts significant growth, with a projected CAGR of 8.4% from 2025 to 2031. Key factors driving this growth include the rising demand for immunotherapies, increased use of personalized medicine, and a growing emphasis on cancer research. The global market offers opportunities in the cell/gene therapy sector.

data.title: Coinbase plans to release prediction market and tokenized equities on December 17 amid growing interest and criticism.
data.description: Coinbase, a popular cryptocurrency exchange, is preparing to introduce its prediction market amid growing interest and scrutiny. This move comes as the platform experiences a surge in activity, with a significant increase in users and trading volume. The prediction market will allow users to make bets on various outcomes using cryptocurrency. This development reflects the increasing diversification of services offered by Coinbase to cater to the evolving needs of its customers.

data.title: S&P 500 stocks, including UnitedHealth and Centene, rise as a discharge petition may prompt House ACA vote.
data.description: A discharge petition has the potential to pressure the Republican Party, as there is a push for a House vote on the Affordable Care Act (ACA). This development has impacted S&P 500 stocks, with UnitedHealth and Centene seeing increases. This information was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Adobe stock bounces back after Q4 report shows progress with AI strategy, per Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: The stock of Adobe is experiencing a recovery following the release of its Q4 report indicating advancements in its AI tactics. This positive development has led to a rebound in Adobe's stock value. The software company is making strides in its AI strategy, which has garnered investor interest. This information was originally reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Alpine Bank founder Bob Young passes away on December 11, 2025 in Florida, surrounded by loved ones.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, in Florida, Bob Young passed away peacefully, leaving behind a grieving family and friends. This beloved father, life partner, grandfather, and friend will be deeply missed. The Young family announced the sad news from Glenwood Springs, Colorado, on December 12, 2025, without specifying the cause of death. The exact age of Bob at the time of his passing was not disclosed. The loss of this cherished individual has undoubtedly left a significant impact on those who knew him.

data.title: Lithium Royalty Corp. praises Power Metals for offtake deal with Albemarle; LRC holds 2.0% GOR royalty on project. Albemarle is a $16B company.
data.description: In Toronto, Lithium Royalty Corp. (TSX: LIRC) congratulates Power Metals Corp. on its cesium concentrate offtake agreement with Albemarle Corporation. Albemarle Corporation (NYSE: ALB) is a formidable company with a market value of US$16 billion and a significant presence in critical minerals like lithium and cesium. LRC, holding a 2.0% GOR royalty on Power Metals’ Case Lake project, commends this significant milestone. Albemarle's acquisition of the offtake rights signifies a positive development in the sector.

data.title: Global food waste recycling machine market expected to grow at a CAGR of 6.6% from 2025 to 2031 due to rising food waste and environmental concerns.
data.description: In Dublin, an updated report on the Food Waste Recycling Machine Market is now available, offering insights, trends, forecasts, and competitive analysis up to 2031. The report, added to ResearchAndMarkets.com, projects a 6.6% compound annual growth rate (CAGR) for the global food waste recycling machine market between 2025 and 2031. This growth is primarily attributed to factors such as the escalating volume of food waste generated by commercial establishments, heightened environmental consciousness, and increasing governmental backing for waste management initiatives. The report further highlights key segments within the market, providing valuable information for industry players.

data.title: Humanity tools expand global app w/World Chat, DeFi yield via Morpho & QR payments at one million+ merchants in Argentina.
data.description: The latest update includes the addition of World Chat feature with end-to-end encryption for enhanced security. Users can also now access DeFi-powered yield through Morpho. Additionally, QR-code payments can be made at over one million merchants in Argentina, streamlining transactions.

data.title: Global vehicle subscription market to grow at CAGR of 18.8% from 2025 to 2031. Major drivers include cost-effective models and digital platforms.
data.description: The latest report on the Vehicle Subscription Market indicates a promising outlook, forecasting significant growth potential. The global market is projected to expand at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 18.8% between 2025 and 2031. Key factors driving this growth include the increasing popularity of cost-effective subscription models, the expansion of digital platforms and mobile accessibility, as well as the uptick in investments in subscription services. This trend signals a shift towards innovative and convenient vehicle ownership models in the automotive industry.

data.title: Bitcoin drops to $90,000, Ethereum at $3,076.27. 119,115 traders liquidated recently. Crypto market seeks catalysts.
data.description: Bitcoin has dropped to $90,249.67 amidst sideways trading on Friday. Ethereum stands at $3,076.27, Solana at $132.33, XRP at $2.01, Dogecoin at $0.1364, and Shiba Inu at $0.05206. Coinglass data reveals that 119,115 traders faced liquidation recently. Source: Benzinga.com
